creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 203911
v1 patch

Major update to graylog 3.x. I've been running this for months and the update was trivial in my single node ES environment.

For convenience I have the diff on phabricator https://reviews.freebsd.org/D20021 as well, but I'll keep this ticket as master.

I'd really appreciate any users who can test updates and advise how the UPDATING and pkg info notes can be improved.
